sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position Size = Account Capital / (Base Unit / f), where f is the optimal fraction derived from historical trade data. This is fractional Kelly equivalent sizing that determines position size as a ratio of capital to the base accounting unit scaled by optimal f.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing total account capital by the ratio of account size to optimal f value, establishing the fractional kelly criterion for position sizing.
